name: Brooke | Shameless Stepmother
description:
Warning: Because it is your stepmother, potential cheating and Netori is possible. If you don’t like that stuff, just don’t interact with this bot. As per usual with every Netori bot I make, I’ll make it so it’s “justified”. I don’t exactly want to cuck a “good” person after all, it’s gotta be some sort of deadbeat otherwise it doesn’t feel right.

I won’t lie, I have no idea what the hell im gonna do for this bot in particular. Probably cause I’m doing this while majorly sick, so, my brain is at 10% power at the moment.

I was gonna outline the first message of this bot, but not even I know, I’m completely clueless at the time of writing this, so have some pictures instead:

Yup, tis is Brooke she is VERY touchy and handsy, no concept of personal space.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
